# Sresakthimayeil Institute of Nursing and Research

> Last Updated: 2026-03-19

> Sresakthimayeil Institute of Nursing and Research (Sresakthimayeil Institute of Nursing and Research) is an INC-approved nursing college in Tamil Nadu, India, offering B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, and Post Basic B.Sc Nursing programs. Located on the JKKN Institutions campus in Komarapalayam, Namakkal District, with a 500-bed attached teaching hospital for clinical training.

## Key Statistics
- Established: 2007
- Part of: JKKN Institutions (founded 1952, 74+ years)
- Campus: Natarajapuram, NH-544, Komarapalayam, Namakkal, Tamil Nadu 638183
- Teaching Hospital: 500+ bed multi-specialty hospital
- Accreditation: INC Approved, NAAC Accredited, affiliated to TNMGRMU
- Programs: B.Sc Nursing (4 years), M.Sc Nursing (2 years, 5 specializations), Post Basic B.Sc Nursing (2 years)

## Admission Information
- Admission Portal: https://admission.jkkn.ac.in/
- Placement Portal: https://placements.jkkn.ac.in/
- Contact: +91 93458 55001 | nursing@jkkn.ac.in
- Admission Process: Merit-based on 10+2 with PCB (NEET not required in Tamil Nadu)

## M.Sc Nursing Specializations
1. Medical-Surgical Nursing
2. Child Health (Paediatric) Nursing
3. Obstetric and Gynecological Nursing
4. Psychiatric (Mental Health) Nursing
5. Community Health Nursing

## Campus Facilities
- 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital
- Advanced nursing laboratories and simulation labs
- Smart classrooms with digital learning tools
- Library with nursing journals and digital resources
- Separate hostel for men and women
- Sports and recreation facilities
- Wi-Fi enabled campus
- Transport services
- Cafeteria and auditorium

## Key Facts
- Official Name: Sresakthimayeil Institute of Nursing and Research
- Brand Name: JKKN College of Nursing
- Parent Organization: JKKN Institutions
- Founded: 2007
- Accreditation: INC Approved, NAAC Accredited
- Affiliation: Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University (TNMGRMU)
- Recognition: Tamil Nadu Nurses and Midwives Council (TNNMC)
- Location: Komarapalayam, Namakkal, Tamil Nadu 638183, India
- Campus: Natarajapuram, NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore Highway)

## Programs Offered
- B.Sc Nursing — 4-year undergraduate program (60 seats)
- M.Sc Nursing — 2-year postgraduate program (25 seats) with 5 specializations:
  - Medical-Surgical Nursing
  - Child Health (Paediatric) Nursing
  - Obstetric and Gynecological Nursing
  - Psychiatric (Mental Health) Nursing
  - Community Health Nursing
- Post Basic B.Sc Nursing — 2-year program for diploma holders (50 seats)

## Clinical Training
- 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital on campus
- Clinical exposure from Year 1
- Simulation labs and skills laboratory
- Community health postings
- Specialty rotations across all departments

## Placement Highlights
- 97% placement rate
- 80+ recruiting partners
- International placements: NHS UK, Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi, Singapore hospitals
- Domestic recruiters: Apollo, Fortis, MIOT, Manipal Hospitals, Narayana Health
- Highest package: up to 25 LPA (International)

## Departments
- Medical-Surgical Nursing
- Community Health Nursing
- Child Health (Paediatric) Nursing
- Obstetric and Gynecological Nursing
- Psychiatric (Mental Health) Nursing

## Facilities
- Smart classrooms with digital learning tools
- Nursing simulation laboratory
- Well-stocked library with digital resources
- Separate hostel for boys and girls
- Transport facility covering Salem, Erode, Namakkal, Tiruchengode
- Sports and recreation facilities
- Wi-Fi enabled campus
- Auditorium and seminar halls
- Cafeteria

## Accreditation & Recognition
- Approved by: Indian Nursing Council (INC), New Delhi
- Recognized by: Tamil Nadu Nurses and Midwives Council (TNNMC)
- Affiliated to: Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai
- Accreditation: NAAC Accredited [exact grade unverified]
- Parent Organization: JKK Nattraja Educational Institutions (Est. 1952)

## Scholarships
- Government scholarships for SC/ST/OBC/MBC students
- Merit-based scholarships for academic toppers
- Management quota fee concessions available
- Central and State government scholarship schemes applicable

## Research & Publications
- Active research culture with faculty publications in indexed journals
- Annual research symposiums and conferences
- Student research projects from 3rd year onwards
- Collaboration with 500+ bed teaching hospital for clinical research

## Student-Faculty Ratio
- Maintains INC-mandated student-faculty ratio
- Dedicated clinical instructors for hospital training
- Guest lectures from industry experts and healthcare professionals

## Why JKKN College of Nursing
- 74+ year legacy of JKK Nattraja Educational Institutions (since 1952)
- Clinical exposure from Year 1 at attached 500+ bed multi-specialty hospital
- International placement opportunities: UK (NHS), UAE, Saudi Arabia, Singapore
- 97% placement rate with 100+ recruiting partners
- Located on NH-544 (Salem-Coimbatore Highway) with excellent connectivity
- Hostel, transport, sports, Wi-Fi campus, and modern simulation labs
